title: Accounting String Subcomponent Values
description: The details of an accounting string subcomponent.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the accounting string subcomponent value.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the accounting string subcomponent value.

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of the accounting string subcomponent value.

code.title: Code
code.description: The code used to identify the accounting string subcomponent value.

subcomponent.title: Subcomponent
subcomponent.description: The accounting string subcomponent used in the accounting string.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Subcomponent.

parentSubcomponent.title: Parent Subcomponent
parentSubcomponent.description: The accounting string subcomponent that is one level higher in the subcomponent hierarchy.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Parent Subcomponent.
